transcript.text:
Where can I get some spicy rice cakes?
Nowhere
Why do you crave something we don't have?
I really want some spicy rice cake
Go into that building and turn right
You should be able to find a place
[They are requesting her to do a Kimbap (Korean seaweed roll) mukbang]
Well, let's go check it out!
Oh, they do have spicy rice cake
It's a coffee/tea shop
Excuse me
Do you guys sell spicy rice cake?
Yes
What a relief
It will taste different than your city-spicy rice cake
It'll be more like homemade?

Yes
I love it!
This place feels like
An old family home
When did you first start this business?
About 20 years ago
20? Wow, that's a long time
I couldn't find anywhere else that sells spicy rice cakes
This was the only place
I'm craving it
[Cooking Tteokboki (Spicy Rice Cake) on the spot!]
It's out already? Thank you!
[Doesn't look like it's going to be enough for Tzuyang]
I kind of eat a lot
4 rolls of Kimbap,
2 bowls of udon,

1 bowl of soybean noodles
[That's it]
It doesn't taste like the ones out in the market
It's like what your grandmother would make you at home
Grandmother's spicy rice cake
The sesame seeds on top really make it delicious
I will eat scallions
Sometimes..
It tastes good
I was hungry
Let's wrap rice cake with the fish cake
Ta-da
Udon! Thank you!
It's like the ones they sell at the soup stand
This spicy rice cake is very addicting
It's tasty

It's very sweet
[Viewer: Is the rice cake flour or rice?]
I don't know
Just a sec, I'll try it again
I think flour
Am I correct?
Yay
I know my rice cakes
It tastes like udon from soup stands
Eat slowly
[No one is chasing after you]
I'll give you some kimchi Thank you!
That looks amazing
I made it myself You did? Wow
Thank you
It's so delicious

It's amazing
It's a very normal kimbap
Yummy
How do I say this? The rice is like...
Sushi rice?
The sauce is very sweet and sour
Their Kimbaps are the best
That's the only place you can get Kimbap
That place has really good Kimbap
[This place specializes in Kimbap!]
[Secret sauce]
[Kimbap Professional]
The kimbap is...
[It's not your everyday-kimbap!]
That lady is really good with Kimbap
Really? It tastes so good

I use some vinegar to make the Kimbap
Just like sushi!
It's really like the rice that comes in sushi
It's not regular rice
It's not dry at all Very easy to eat
Kimbaps are usually pretty dry
The rice is incredible
Dip
Very good
The kimchi is really great
2 pieces
It's a busy day for me today
Why is that?
I have to prepare for a memorial ceremony tomorrow (ancestral ritual)
Let's hurry and leave
It's okay!

Soybean noodles!
Thank you
It's yellow
Let's try the soup
What is this?
They have the best soybean noodles and kimbap
[Soup-holic]
My grandkids are saying Tzuyang is...
Oh, do you know me?
They really like you Please give me an autograph
Yes ma'am
Kimbap tastes really good
It's definitely different than a regular kimbap
I forgot about the udon
I keep eating the kimbap
Would you like some more kimchi?

Yes please, thank you
Soybean noodles
You really ate all of that...
It's still not enough
[You're kidding me..]
[Stage 1: Interest. They watch her because it's a first]
[Stage 2: Introduced. They are zoned out (lost in thought)]
[Mukbang techniques]
[Stage 3: Stan. They are happy which results in laughter]
Am I almost done with the food already? That's a shame
You don't even gain weight
[Amazed]
To be honest, I really don't
Yeah, compared to how much you eat
The soup tastes really amazing
I don't want to finish it all I want to save it

It's such a waste to just drink everything
I have to save the rest for last For that last bite
[3 in 1 bite?]
[A piece of cake]
I can fit my whole fist in my mouth
It tastes so delicious
[That last bite she saved for]
[Proud of her]
That was a nice meal
Thanks everyone
[Her granddaughters were waiting to take photos]
[Making memories with Tzuyang]
They are so happy
I am here for some dessert
There's a famous cafe here owned and managed by the elders
Granny Barista

Let's go in
Hello
[Granny barista]
May I have 1 Americano,
1 Strawberry Smoothie,
And 1 Sweet Potato Latte
All hot? No, all iced, please
Iceu?
[What was the order again?]
1 Americano
1 Sweet Potato Latte? Iced? Hot?
All iced, please
[Do you know Tzuyang?] Tzuyang? I heard of her
I heard she's here to live here for a month
[Why are you asking us that?]
[Oh my mother]

[You're that lady?]
[What a thrill]
You look so much prettier in person
Thank you
Is this place completely run by the elders?
Yes
Jobs for the elderly
[Meanwhile Tzuyang is enjoying her dessert]
She is so good at eating~
She eats 20 packs of Ramyun noodles?
Her cheeks will pop
[Watching her mukbang together]
[Dessert on the house]
This is made from the sweet potatoes that are grown on Yokji Island
Everything here is organic
Thank you

[Don't have to worry about leftovers]
Thank you~
[I will be back again]
[2020. 07. 27. Granny Barista]
[Subtitles by Hyun Choi] [antharoni@gmail.com]
